creator: lukejee@lukejee.net
text:
after 
portsnap fetch update

portmaster -ad

apachectl restart

PHP Warning:  PHP Startup: Unable to load dynamic library '/usr/local/lib/php/20060613/pcre.so' - /usr/local/lib/php/20060613/pcre.so: Undefined symbol "php_pcre_free" in Unknown on line 0

How-To-Repeat: uninstall php5-extensions
unisntall php5

reinstall php5
reinstall php5-extensions, enable pcre support
